Package org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.scim.plugin

Class ScimIdentityProviderPlugin

java.lang.Object
org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.scim.ScimConfiguration
org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.scim.plugin.ScimIdentityProviderPlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProcessEnginePlugin
Direct Known Subclasses:
CamundaBpmRunScimProperties
public class ScimIdentityProviderPlugin extends ScimConfiguration implements ProcessEnginePlugin
Process Engine Plugin for SCIM Identity Provider. This class extends ScimConfiguration so that configuration properties can be set directly on this class via the properties element in bpm-platform.xml / processes.xml

  • Field Summary
